I have proven my fitness for Arsenal and England – Jack Wilshere

Speaking after Arsenal’s 3-1 Europa League second-leg victory over Milan, which saw the Gunners into the quarter-finals, Wilshere maintained he never doubted he could achieve his ambitions.

“I knew what I had to do,” he said.


“The manager (Southgate) made it clear what he wanted me to do, get some games for Arsenal in the Premier League. I have done that and he has been true to his word. It is down to me to repay him now.


“It was hard, it was tough. Back in the summer when I was watching the boys training not knowing if I was staying or was I leaving.


“Once I knew I was staying I was determined to get my head down and get back into the team. It is always an honour to play for my country, I have said that many times. I never gave up hope. I believed in myself and I believed in my ability. “

雲加否認阿仙奴淪為盃賽球隊

【now.com體育】阿仙奴今季於英超令人失望，但在歐霸盃就高唱猛進，不過領隊雲加力撐球隊不是於盃賽才能獲得成績。

「我們上季英超拿75分，只差1分就可以殺入歐聯，這是英超史上首次獲75分仍然拿不到歐聯入場券。前季我們成為英超亞軍，今季我們的確在困境中掙扎，只因為作客成績不好。」雲加（Arsene Wenger）表示。

近5年，雲加雖然繼續未能再嚐英超冠軍的滋味，但領軍4度殺入決賽，現在於歐霸盃亦打入8強。他說：「我想說的是，很難於聯賽及歐霸盃同時有好表現。數據證明了，所有於歐霸盃角逐的球隊，都在所屬的聯賽掙扎。」

阿仙奴今季已曾殺入英聯盃決賽，只是不敵曼城而未能捧盃，雲加大讚球員能很快就從失盃的不快中翻身：「在失盃之後，很難令球員重新專注比賽，所以我們的心理狀態很強及健康。」

Arsenal really really really liked the idea of Löw as our next manager but with the World Cup this year the timings and preparation for the new season just doesn’t work out for us. Should we fail to agree terms with Allegri then we will turn full attention to Löw.

Allegri will stay as our number 1 target until the end of the season as it currently stands. Source is very confident we can agree a deal with him at the end of the season should wenger leave. #AFC

Before arsene signed his last deal we was very very close to bringing allegri in.. he had multiple meetings with the board and gazidis was VERY fond of the idea. Unfortunately it didn’t happen for a few reasons but not because allegri didn’t want the job 👍🏼

I’ve always been told that the feeling within the club was wenger would step down regardless of what happens at the end of this year. But if we win the Europa league my PERSONAL opinion is he will see out his final year..
